register_preop_case.description: register a preop case A as a preoperative case
preconditions: I can only register a preop case A as a preoperative case if it is not the case that A is a registered preoperative case and it is not the case that A is ready for the procedure
effects: Once I register a preop case A as a preoperative case, it is the case that A is a registered preoperative case

reserve_appointment_slot_for_case.description: reserve an appointment slot B for a preop case A
preconditions: I can only reserve an appointment slot B for a preop case A if it is the case that A is a registered preoperative case and B is available and A is compatible with B
I can only reserve an appointment slot B for a preop case A if it is not the case that A has an appointment
effects: Once I reserve an appointment slot B for a preop case A, it is the case that A is assigned to appointment slot B and A has an appointment
Once I reserve an appointment slot B for a preop case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_appointment_slot_from_case.description: release an appointment slot B from a preop case A
preconditions: I can only release an appointment slot B from a preop case A if it is the case that A is assigned to appointment slot B
I can only release an appointment slot B from a preop case A if it is not the case that the procedure for A is confirmed and it is not the case that the team assignment for A is confirmed
effects: Once I release an appointment slot B from a preop case A, it is the case that B is available

Once I release an appointment slot B from a preop case A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to appointment slot B and it is not the case anymore that A has an appointment and it is not the case anymore that case checks have been initiated for A and it is not the case anymore that nursing check is complete for A and it is not the case anymore that A requires technician follow up and it is not the case anymore that A is provisionally scheduled and it is not the case anymore that A requires additional setup

reserve_preop_nurse_slot_for_case.description: reserve a preop nurse slot B for a preop case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a preop nurse slot B for a preop case A if it is the case that A is a registered preoperative case and B is available
effects: Once I reserve a preop nurse slot B for a preop case A, it is the case that A is assigned to the preoperative nurse slot B
Once I reserve a preop nurse slot B for a preop case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_preop_nurse_slot_from_case.description: release a preop nurse slot B from a preop case A
preconditions: I can only release a preop nurse slot B from a preop case A if it is the case that A is assigned to the preoperative nurse slot B
effects: Once I release a preop nurse slot B from a preop case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a preop nurse slot B from a preop case A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to the preoperative nurse slot B

initiate_preop_checks_via_nurse_slot.description: initiate preoperative checks for a preop case A via a preop nurse slot B
preconditions: I can only initiate preoperative checks for a preop case A via a preop nurse slot B if it is the case that A is a registered preoperative case and A has an appointment and A is assigned to the preoperative nurse slot B
I can only initiate preoperative checks for a preop case A via a preop nurse slot B if it is not the case that case checks have been initiated for A
effects: Once I initiate preoperative checks for a preop case A via a preop nurse slot B, it is the case that case checks have been initiated for A

assign_diagnostic_technician_and_initiat.description: assign a diagnostic technician B to a preop case A and initiate check
preconditions: I can only assign a diagnostic technician B to a preop case A and initiate check if it is the case that A is a registered preoperative case and A has an appointment and B is available
I can only assign a diagnostic technician B to a preop case A and initiate check if it is not the case that case checks have been initiated for A
effects: Once I assign a diagnostic technician B to a preop case A and initiate check, it is the case that case checks have been initiated for A and A requires technician follow up
Once I assign a diagnostic technician B to a preop case A and initiate check, it is not the case anymore that B is available

complete_nursing_assessment.description: complete nursing assessment for a preop case A with a preop nurse C in a preop nurse slot B
preconditions: I can only complete nursing assessment for a preop case A with a preop nurse C in a preop nurse slot B if it is the case that case checks have been initiated for A and A has an appointment and A is assigned to the preoperative nurse slot B and C is available
I can only complete nursing assessment for a preop case A with a preop nurse C in a preop nurse slot B if it is not the case that nursing check is complete for A
effects: Once I complete nursing assessment for a preop case A with a preop nurse C in a preop nurse slot B, it is the case that nursing check is complete for A
Once I complete nursing assessment for a preop case A with a preop nurse C in a preop nurse slot B, it is not the case anymore that A requires technician follow up

clinician_finalize_nursing_check.description: clinician finalizes nursing check for a preop case A in a clinician slot B
preconditions: I can only clinician finalizes nursing check for a preop case A in a clinician slot B if it is the case that A has an appointment and A is assigned to reserved clinician slot B
I can only clinician finalizes nursing check for a preop case A in a clinician slot B if it is not the case that nursing check is complete for A
effects: Once I clinician finalizes nursing check for a preop case A in a clinician slot B, it is the case that nursing check is complete for A
Once I clinician finalizes nursing check for a preop case A in a clinician slot B, it is not the case anymore that A requires technician follow up

reserve_equipment_for_case.description: reserve a device or equipment B for a preop case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a device or equipment B for a preop case A if it is the case that A is a registered preoperative case and B is available and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I reserve a device or equipment B for a preop case A, it is the case that A is assigned the device or equipment B
Once I reserve a device or equipment B for a preop case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_equipment_for_case.description: release a device or equipment B from a preop case A
preconditions: I can only release a device or equipment B from a preop case A if it is the case that A is assigned the device or equipment B
effects: Once I release a device or equipment B from a preop case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a device or equipment B from a preop case A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned the device or equipment B

reserve_location_for_case.description: reserve a physical location B for a preop case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a physical location B for a preop case A if it is the case that A is a registered preoperative case and B is available and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I reserve a physical location B for a preop case A, it is the case that A is assigned the physical location B
Once I reserve a physical location B for a preop case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_location_for_case.description: release a physical location B for a preop case A
preconditions: I can only release a physical location B for a preop case A if it is the case that A is assigned the physical location B
effects: Once I release a physical location B for a preop case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a physical location B for a preop case A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned the physical location B

reserve_support_service_for_case.description: reserve a support service B for a preop case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a support service B for a preop case A if it is the case that A is a registered preoperative case and B is available and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I reserve a support service B for a preop case A, it is the case that A is assigned the support service B
Once I reserve a support service B for a preop case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_support_service_for_case.description: release a support service B from a preop case A
preconditions: I can only release a support service B from a preop case A if it is the case that A is assigned the support service B
effects: Once I release a support service B from a preop case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a support service B from a preop case A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned the support service B

reserve_modality_for_case.description: reserve a modality reservation B for a preop case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a modality reservation B for a preop case A if it is the case that A is a registered preoperative case and B is available and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I reserve a modality reservation B for a preop case A, it is the case that A is assigned the modality reservation B
Once I reserve a modality reservation B for a preop case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_modality_from_case.description: release a modality reservation B from a preop case A
preconditions: I can only release a modality reservation B from a preop case A if it is the case that A is assigned the modality reservation B
effects: Once I release a modality reservation B from a preop case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a modality reservation B from a preop case A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned the modality reservation B

schedule_procedure_with_resources.description: schedule a preop case A for a planned procedure B using a device or equipment C at a physical location D
preconditions: I can only schedule a preop case A for a planned procedure B using a device or equipment C at a physical location D if it is the case that A has an appointment and A is assigned the device or equipment C and A is assigned the physical location D and B is available and A is compatible with B
I can only schedule a preop case A for a planned procedure B using a device or equipment C at a physical location D if it is not the case that the procedure for A is confirmed
effects: Once I schedule a preop case A for a planned procedure B using a device or equipment C at a physical location D, it is the case that A is scheduled for the procedure B and the procedure for A is confirmed
Once I schedule a preop case A for a planned procedure B using a device or equipment C at a physical location D, it is not the case anymore that B is available

schedule_procedure_with_lab_and_resource.description: schedule a preop case A for a planned procedure B with a support service C using a laboratory slot D
preconditions: I can only schedule a preop case A for a planned procedure B with a support service C using a laboratory slot D if it is the case that A has an appointment and A is assigned the support service C and D is available and B is available and A is compatible with B and A is compatible with D
I can only schedule a preop case A for a planned procedure B with a support service C using a laboratory slot D if it is not the case that the procedure for A is confirmed
effects: Once I schedule a preop case A for a planned procedure B with a support service C using a laboratory slot D, it is the case that A is scheduled for the procedure B and the procedure for A is confirmed and A requires additional setup and A requires technician follow up

Once I schedule a preop case A for a planned procedure B with a support service C using a laboratory slot D, it is not the case anymore that B is available and it is not the case anymore that D is available

finalize_additional_setup.description: finalize additional setup for a preop case A using a device or equipment B at a physical location C
preconditions: I can only finalize additional setup for a preop case A using a device or equipment B at a physical location C if it is the case that the procedure for A is confirmed and A requires additional setup and A is assigned the device or equipment B and A is assigned the physical location C
effects: Once I finalize additional setup for a preop case A using a device or equipment B at a physical location C, it is not the case anymore that A requires additional setup and it is not the case anymore that A requires technician follow up

confirm_operating_team_assignment.description: confirm operating team assignment for a preop case A with a device or equipment B at a physical location C using an operating team D
preconditions: I can only confirm operating team assignment for a preop case A with a device or equipment B at a physical location C using an operating team D if it is the case that nursing check is complete for A and the procedure for A is confirmed and A is assigned the device or equipment B and A is assigned the physical location C and A is assigned to D

I can only confirm operating team assignment for a preop case A with a device or equipment B at a physical location C using an operating team D if it is not the case that A requires technician follow up and it is not the case that the team assignment for A is confirmed
effects: Once I confirm operating team assignment for a preop case A with a device or equipment B at a physical location C using an operating team D, it is the case that the team assignment for A is confirmed

confirm_team_assignment_with_anesthesia.description: confirm team assignment with anesthesia for a preop case A using a support service B with a modality reservation C and an anesthesia team D
preconditions: I can only confirm team assignment with anesthesia for a preop case A using a support service B with a modality reservation C and an anesthesia team D if it is the case that nursing check is complete for A and the procedure for A is confirmed and A is assigned the support service B and A is assigned the modality reservation C and A is assigned to D

I can only confirm team assignment with anesthesia for a preop case A using a support service B with a modality reservation C and an anesthesia team D if it is not the case that the team assignment for A is confirmed
effects: Once I confirm team assignment with anesthesia for a preop case A using a support service B with a modality reservation C and an anesthesia team D, it is the case that the team assignment for A is confirmed and A requires technician follow up

provisionally_schedule_case.description: provisionally schedule a preop case A with a device or equipment B at a physical location C
preconditions: I can only provisionally schedule a preop case A with a device or equipment B at a physical location C if it is the case that the team assignment for A is confirmed and A requires technician follow up and A is assigned the device or equipment B and A is assigned the physical location C
effects: Once I provisionally schedule a preop case A with a device or equipment B at a physical location C, it is the case that A is provisionally scheduled

Once I provisionally schedule a preop case A with a device or equipment B at a physical location C, it is not the case anymore that A requires technician follow up and it is not the case anymore that nursing check is complete for A and it is not the case anymore that A requires additional setup

restore_nursing_check_after_provisional.description: restore nursing check for a preop case A with a preop nurse C in a preop nurse slot B after provisional scheduling
preconditions: I can only restore nursing check for a preop case A with a preop nurse C in a preop nurse slot B after provisional scheduling if it is the case that A is provisionally scheduled and the team assignment for A is confirmed and A has an appointment and A is assigned to the preoperative nurse slot B and C is available
I can only restore nursing check for a preop case A with a preop nurse C in a preop nurse slot B after provisional scheduling if it is not the case that nursing check is complete for A
effects: Once I restore nursing check for a preop case A with a preop nurse C in a preop nurse slot B after provisional scheduling, it is the case that nursing check is complete for A

mark_nurse_checklist_complete.description: mark nurse checklist complete for a preop case A in a preop nurse slot B
preconditions: I can only mark nurse checklist complete for a preop case A in a preop nurse slot B if it is the case that the team assignment for A is confirmed and nursing check is complete for A and A is assigned to the preoperative nurse slot B

I can only mark nurse checklist complete for a preop case A in a preop nurse slot B if it is not the case that A requires technician follow up and it is not the case that the nurse checklist for A is complete
effects: Once I mark nurse checklist complete for a preop case A in a preop nurse slot B, it is the case that the nurse checklist for A is complete

mark_diagnostic_checklist_complete.description: mark diagnostic checklist complete for a preop case A with a diagnostic technician B
preconditions: I can only mark diagnostic checklist complete for a preop case A with a diagnostic technician B if it is the case that the team assignment for A is confirmed and nursing check is complete for A and B is available

I can only mark diagnostic checklist complete for a preop case A with a diagnostic technician B if it is not the case that A requires technician follow up and it is not the case that the nurse checklist for A is complete
effects: Once I mark diagnostic checklist complete for a preop case A with a diagnostic technician B, it is the case that the nurse checklist for A is complete
Once I mark diagnostic checklist complete for a preop case A with a diagnostic technician B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

assign_clinician_slot_to_case.description: assign a clinician slot B to a preop case A
preconditions: I can only assign a clinician slot B to a preop case A if it is the case that the nurse checklist for A is complete and B is available and B is compatible with the case type of A
effects: Once I assign a clinician slot B to a preop case A, it is the case that A is assigned to B
Once I assign a clinician slot B to a preop case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

reserve_clinician_slot_for_urgent_case.description: reserve a clinician slot C for an urgent case type A replacing an elective case type B
preconditions: I can only reserve a clinician slot C for an urgent case type A replacing an elective case type B if it is the case that A is a registered preoperative case and A is an urgent case and A is assigned to clinician slot candidate C and B is assigned to C
I can only reserve a clinician slot C for an urgent case type A replacing an elective case type B if it is not the case that A is assigned to reserved clinician slot C
effects: Once I reserve a clinician slot C for an urgent case type A replacing an elective case type B, it is the case that A is assigned to reserved clinician slot C

acknowledge_nursing_clearance.description: acknowledge nursing clearance for a preoperative case A with a preoperative nurse C in a preoperative nurse slot B
preconditions: I can only acknowledge nursing clearance for a preoperative case A with a preoperative nurse C in a preoperative nurse slot B if it is the case that A is a registered preoperative case and A is an urgent case and nursing check is complete for A and the nurse checklist for A is complete and A is assigned to the preoperative nurse slot B and C is available
I can only acknowledge nursing clearance for a preoperative case A with a preoperative nurse C in a preoperative nurse slot B if it is not the case that nurse clearance for A is acknowledged
effects: Once I acknowledge nursing clearance for a preoperative case A with a preoperative nurse C in a preoperative nurse slot B, it is the case that nurse clearance for A is acknowledged

finalize_case_clearance.description: finalize case clearance for a preoperative case A
preconditions: I can only finalize case clearance for a preoperative case A if it is the case that A is an elective case and A is a registered preoperative case and A has an appointment and the procedure for A is confirmed and the team assignment for A is confirmed and the nurse checklist for A is complete and nursing check is complete for A
I can only finalize case clearance for a preoperative case A if it is not the case that A is ready for the procedure
effects: Once I finalize case clearance for a preoperative case A, it is the case that A is ready for the procedure

finalize_case_clearance_with_clinician_s.description: finalize case clearance for a preoperative case A with a clinician slot B
preconditions: I can only finalize case clearance for a preoperative case A with a clinician slot B if it is the case that A is an urgent case and A is a registered preoperative case and A has an appointment and the procedure for A is confirmed and the team assignment for A is confirmed and the nurse checklist for A is complete and nursing check is complete for A and A is assigned to reserved clinician slot B
I can only finalize case clearance for a preoperative case A with a clinician slot B if it is not the case that A is ready for the procedure
effects: Once I finalize case clearance for a preoperative case A with a clinician slot B, it is the case that A is ready for the procedure

finalize_case_clearance_with_lab_acknowl.description: finalize case clearance for a preoperative case A with lab acknowledgement
preconditions: I can only finalize case clearance for a preoperative case A with lab acknowledgement if it is the case that A is an urgent case and A is a registered preoperative case and A has an appointment and the procedure for A is confirmed and the team assignment for A is confirmed and the nurse checklist for A is complete and nursing check is complete for A and nurse clearance for A is acknowledged
I can only finalize case clearance for a preoperative case A with lab acknowledgement if it is not the case that A is ready for the procedure
effects: Once I finalize case clearance for a preoperative case A with lab acknowledgement, it is the case that A is ready for the procedure

action_nl_templates.register_preop_case: register preop case {?preop_case} as a preoperative case
action_nl_templates.reserve_appointment_slot_for_case: reserve appointment slot {?appointment_slot} for preop case {?preop_case}
action_nl_templates.release_appointment_slot_from_case: release appointment slot {?appointment_slot} from preop case {?preop_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_preop_nurse_slot_for_case: reserve preop nurse slot {?preop_nurse_slot} for preop case {?preop_case}
action_nl_templates.release_preop_nurse_slot_from_case: release preop nurse slot {?preop_nurse_slot} from preop case {?preop_case}
action_nl_templates.initiate_preop_checks_via_nurse_slot: initiate preoperative checks for preop case {?preop_case} via preop nurse slot {?preop_nurse_slot}
action_nl_templates.assign_diagnostic_technician_and_initiat: assign diagnostic technician {?diagnostic_technician} to preop case {?preop_case} and initiate check
action_nl_templates.complete_nursing_assessment: complete nursing assessment for preop case {?preop_case} with preop nurse {?preop_nurse} in preop nurse slot {?preop_nurse_slot}
action_nl_templates.clinician_finalize_nursing_check: clinician finalizes nursing check for preop case {?preop_case} in clinician slot {?clinician_slot}
action_nl_templates.reserve_equipment_for_case: reserve device or equipment {?device_or_equipment} for preop case {?preop_case}
action_nl_templates.release_equipment_for_case: release device or equipment {?device_or_equipment} from preop case {?preop_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_location_for_case: reserve physical location {?physical_location} for preop case {?preop_case}
action_nl_templates.release_location_for_case: release physical location {?physical_location} for preop case {?preop_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_support_service_for_case: reserve support service {?support_service} for preop case {?preop_case}
action_nl_templates.release_support_service_for_case: release support service {?support_service} from preop case {?preop_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_modality_for_case: reserve modality reservation {?modality_reservation} for preop case {?preop_case}
action_nl_templates.release_modality_from_case: release modality reservation {?modality_reservation} from preop case {?preop_case}
action_nl_templates.schedule_procedure_with_resources: schedule preop case {?preop_case} for planned procedure {?planned_procedure} using device or equipment {?device_or_equipment} at physical location {?physical_location}
action_nl_templates.schedule_procedure_with_lab_and_resource: schedule preop case {?preop_case} for planned procedure {?planned_procedure} with support service {?support_service} using laboratory slot {?laboratory_slot}
action_nl_templates.finalize_additional_setup: finalize additional setup for preop case {?preop_case} using device or equipment {?device_or_equipment} at physical location {?physical_location}
action_nl_templates.confirm_operating_team_assignment: confirm operating team assignment for preop case {?preop_case} with device or equipment {?device_or_equipment} at physical location {?physical_location} using operating team {?operating_team}
action_nl_templates.confirm_team_assignment_with_anesthesia: confirm team assignment with anesthesia for preop case {?preop_case} using support service {?support_service} with modality reservation {?modality_reservation} and anesthesia team {?anesthesia_team}
action_nl_templates.provisionally_schedule_case: provisionally schedule preop case {?preop_case} with device or equipment {?device_or_equipment} at physical location {?physical_location}
action_nl_templates.restore_nursing_check_after_provisional: restore nursing check for preop case {?preop_case} with preop nurse {?preop_nurse} in preop nurse slot {?preop_nurse_slot} after provisional scheduling
action_nl_templates.mark_nurse_checklist_complete: mark nurse checklist complete for preop case {?preop_case} in preop nurse slot {?preop_nurse_slot}
action_nl_templates.mark_diagnostic_checklist_complete: mark diagnostic checklist complete for preop case {?preop_case} with diagnostic technician {?diagnostic_technician}
action_nl_templates.assign_clinician_slot_to_case: assign clinician slot {?clinician_slot} to preop case {?preop_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_clinician_slot_for_urgent_case: reserve clinician slot {?clinician_slot} for urgent case type {?case_type_urgent} replacing elective case type {?case_type_elective}
action_nl_templates.acknowledge_nursing_clearance: acknowledge nursing clearance for preoperative case {?preop_case} with preoperative nurse {?preop_nurse} in preoperative nurse slot {?preop_nurse_slot}
action_nl_templates.finalize_case_clearance: finalize case clearance for preoperative case {?preop_case}
action_nl_templates.finalize_case_clearance_with_clinician_s: finalize case clearance for preoperative case {?preop_case} with clinician slot {?clinician_slot}
action_nl_templates.finalize_case_clearance_with_lab_acknowl: finalize case clearance for preoperative case {?preop_case} with lab acknowledgement

predicate_nl_templates.case_checks_initiated: case checks have been initiated for {?preop_case}
predicate_nl_templates.case_assigned_device_or_equipment: {?preop_case} is assigned the device or equipment {?device_or_equipment}
predicate_nl_templates.case_team_assignment_confirmed: the team assignment for {?preop_case} is confirmed
predicate_nl_templates.case_nurse_checklist_complete: the nurse checklist for {?preop_case} is complete
predicate_nl_templates.case_assigned_clinician_slot_candidate: {?preop_case} is assigned to clinician slot candidate {?clinician_slot}
predicate_nl_templates.case_assigned_clinician_slot_reserved: {?preop_case} is assigned to reserved clinician slot {?clinician_slot}
predicate_nl_templates.case_assigned_preop_nurse_slot: {?preop_case} is assigned to the preoperative nurse slot {?preop_nurse_slot}
predicate_nl_templates.clinician_slot_compatible_with_case_type: {?clinician_slot} is compatible with the case type of {?preop_case}

action_nl_templates_indef.register_preop_case: register a preop case {?preop_case} as a preoperative case
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_appointment_slot_for_case: reserve an appointment slot {?appointment_slot} for a preop case {?preop_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_appointment_slot_from_case: release an appointment slot {?appointment_slot} from a preop case {?preop_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_preop_nurse_slot_for_case: reserve a preop nurse slot {?preop_nurse_slot} for a preop case {?preop_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_preop_nurse_slot_from_case: release a preop nurse slot {?preop_nurse_slot} from a preop case {?preop_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.initiate_preop_checks_via_nurse_slot: initiate preoperative checks for a preop case {?preop_case} via a preop nurse slot {?preop_nurse_slot}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_diagnostic_technician_and_initiat: assign a diagnostic technician {?diagnostic_technician} to a preop case {?preop_case} and initiate check
action_nl_templates_indef.complete_nursing_assessment: complete nursing assessment for a preop case {?preop_case} with a preop nurse {?preop_nurse} in a preop nurse slot {?preop_nurse_slot}
action_nl_templates_indef.clinician_finalize_nursing_check: clinician finalizes nursing check for a preop case {?preop_case} in a clinician slot {?clinician_slot}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_equipment_for_case: reserve a device or equipment {?device_or_equipment} for a preop case {?preop_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_equipment_for_case: release a device or equipment {?device_or_equipment} from a preop case {?preop_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_location_for_case: reserve a physical location {?physical_location} for a preop case {?preop_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_location_for_case: release a physical location {?physical_location} for a preop case {?preop_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_support_service_for_case: reserve a support service {?support_service} for a preop case {?preop_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_support_service_for_case: release a support service {?support_service} from a preop case {?preop_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_modality_for_case: reserve a modality reservation {?modality_reservation} for a preop case {?preop_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_modality_from_case: release a modality reservation {?modality_reservation} from a preop case {?preop_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.schedule_procedure_with_resources: schedule a preop case {?preop_case} for a planned procedure {?planned_procedure} using a device or equipment {?device_or_equipment} at a physical location {?physical_location}
action_nl_templates_indef.schedule_procedure_with_lab_and_resource: schedule a preop case {?preop_case} for a planned procedure {?planned_procedure} with a support service {?support_service} using a laboratory slot {?laboratory_slot}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_additional_setup: finalize additional setup for a preop case {?preop_case} using a device or equipment {?device_or_equipment} at a physical location {?physical_location}
action_nl_templates_indef.confirm_operating_team_assignment: confirm operating team assignment for a preop case {?preop_case} with a device or equipment {?device_or_equipment} at a physical location {?physical_location} using an operating team {?operating_team}
action_nl_templates_indef.confirm_team_assignment_with_anesthesia: confirm team assignment with anesthesia for a preop case {?preop_case} using a support service {?support_service} with a modality reservation {?modality_reservation} and an anesthesia team {?anesthesia_team}
action_nl_templates_indef.provisionally_schedule_case: provisionally schedule a preop case {?preop_case} with a device or equipment {?device_or_equipment} at a physical location {?physical_location}
action_nl_templates_indef.restore_nursing_check_after_provisional: restore nursing check for a preop case {?preop_case} with a preop nurse {?preop_nurse} in a preop nurse slot {?preop_nurse_slot} after provisional scheduling
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_nurse_checklist_complete: mark nurse checklist complete for a preop case {?preop_case} in a preop nurse slot {?preop_nurse_slot}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_diagnostic_checklist_complete: mark diagnostic checklist complete for a preop case {?preop_case} with a diagnostic technician {?diagnostic_technician}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_clinician_slot_to_case: assign a clinician slot {?clinician_slot} to a preop case {?preop_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_clinician_slot_for_urgent_case: reserve a clinician slot {?clinician_slot} for an urgent case type {?case_type_urgent} replacing an elective case type {?case_type_elective}
action_nl_templates_indef.acknowledge_nursing_clearance: acknowledge nursing clearance for a preoperative case {?preop_case} with a preoperative nurse {?preop_nurse} in a preoperative nurse slot {?preop_nurse_slot}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_case_clearance: finalize case clearance for a preoperative case {?preop_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_case_clearance_with_clinician_s: finalize case clearance for a preoperative case {?preop_case} with a clinician slot {?clinician_slot}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_case_clearance_with_lab_acknowl: finalize case clearance for a preoperative case {?preop_case} with lab acknowledgement

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a preop case or a appointment slot or a planned procedure or a physical location or a device or equipment or a support service or a preop nurse slot or a diagnostic technician or a clinician slot or a preop nurse or a laboratory slot or a modality reservation or a clinical team is also a object
Everything that is a operating team or a anesthesia team is also a clinical team
Everything that is a case type elective or a case type urgent is also a preop case
